narration: The dimming of a star holds a secret about its planets.
visual_description: Hook visual: The dimming of a star holds a secret about its planets.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: The dimming of a star holds a secret about its planets.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: The dimming of a star holds a secret about its planets.

narration: When a planet transits—crosses in front of its star—it causes a temporary dip in brightness.
visual_description: Context visual: When a planet transits—crosses in front of its star—it causes a temporary dip in brightness.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: When a planet transits—crosses in front of its star—it causes a temporary dip in brightness.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: When a planet transits—crosses in front of its star—it causes a temporary dip in brightness.

narration: But how much it dims reveals the planet's size compared to the star.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But how much it dims reveals the planet's size compared to the star.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But how much it dims reveals the planet's size compared to the star.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But how much it dims reveals the planet's size compared to the star.

narration: A larger planet blocks more light, creating a deeper transit signal.
visual_description: Evidence visual: A larger planet blocks more light, creating a deeper transit signal.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: A larger planet blocks more light, creating a deeper transit signal.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: A larger planet blocks more light, creating a deeper transit signal.

narration: This method helps astronomers estimate sizes without ever visiting those distant worlds.
